summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-COMP-001 through VAL-COMP-012): all 12 passed. Existing pytest suite (37 tests) also passes. All comparison statistics, pairwise comparison, cascade funnel, cascade completion, zero-detection edge cases, session agreement, and multi-config pairwise functions work correctly.
